class.name: TrainUniversalController
class.brief_description: Represents the universal controller (Zadajnik jazdy i hamowania) in a train.
class.description: [TrainUniversalController] is a train part that handles the universal controller, grouping traction and braking controls together as defined by the UCList configuration in MaSzyna. It handles positions that map to both traction and braking states.

members.member: Determines whether the integrated brake (ED/HD/auxiliary pneumatic) is supported on this controller.
Determines whether the train's pneumatic brake is supported on this controller.
The current position of the controller selector.
An array of [UCListItem] resources defining the controller's positions.
